title: Ocugen Inc (OCGN) Q2 2024 Earnings: Key Takeaways
text: Ocugen Inc (OCGN) Q2 2024 Earnings: Key Takeaways. Earnings Highlights: Positive Developments: Successfully raised $32.6 million, extending runway into the third quarter of 2025. Achieved FDA approval for expanded access program for OCU400 gene therapy for retinitis pigmentosa. Received orphan drug designations from FDA and European Medicines Agency. Obtained RMAT (Regenerative Medicine Advanced Therapy) designation from FDA. Added to Russell Index, validating pipeline value. Financial Challenges: Cash reserves declined sharply: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash dropped from $39.5 million (end of 2023) to $16 million (June 30, 2024). Q2 operating expenses reached $16.6 million with R&D at $8.9 million and G&A at $7.7 million. 257.4 million shares outstanding dilutes equity value. Strategic Advances: The company progresses multiple clinical trials including the OCU400 Phase 3 liMeliGhT trial and OCU410 Phase 2 ArMaDa trial, targeting serious eye conditions with significant unmet medical needs. Critical Concern: Clinical hold remains on OCU200, potentially delaying near-term catalysts.
